title: Claude Fable 5 Just Changed Website Design Forever
summary: Jack Roberts demonstrates Claude Fable 5 capabilities for website design, comparing it against Opus 4.8 across three progressive challenge levels. The video examines token efficiency, design quality details, and strategic deployment choices between model versions.
writeup: Jack Roberts tests Claude Fable 5 on website design, running it against Opus 4.8 through three progressively harder challenge levels. The comparison tracks token efficiency, fine-grained design quality, and when each model version makes sense to deploy. Takeaways center on how the two models differ in output quality and cost, and on the strategic tradeoffs of choosing one version over the other for design work.
